title: tarenna sambucina var. papuana
intro: Tarenna sambucina var. papuana, a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, is a variety of the Tarenna sambucina plant, commonly known for its medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tarenna sambucina var. papuana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion to be consumed as a tea, and it can also be used to make a poultice or ointment for topical application.
